final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: interior lifestyle photo, square crop
Primary request: minimalist Scandinavian living room scene, clean and bright with warm natural light
Scene/backdrop: white walls, light oak hardwood floor, large floor-to-ceiling window letting in soft sunlight
Subject: grey fabric sofa as centerpiece, flanked by a potted green plant and a slim floor lamp
Style/medium: photorealistic interior photography, Scandinavian minimalist aesthetic
Composition/framing: mid-wide shot, eye-level, balanced symmetry with sofa centered
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight streaming through large window, warm and airy, cozy and inviting atmosphere
Color palette: white + light warm wood tones + soft grey + muted greens + warm golden sunlight
Materials/textures: smooth matte white plaster walls, fine-grain light oak floor planks, woven linen sofa fabric, ceramic planter
Constraints: keep the scene uncluttered and minimal, no decorative excess, no people in frame
Avoid: dark shadows, cluttered decor, over-saturated colors, artificial-looking lighting
